name: Dados Abertos Senado BR - MCP
description: Independent MCP server for Brazilian Federal Senate open data — 66 tools, 4 prompts and 5 resources across the legislative process, Senate administration and the e-Cidadania portal. Cloudflare Workers, Streamable HTTP, no auth. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the Senate, OpenAI or ChatGPT. Responses in pt-BR. MIT licensed.
